---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new capability or enhancement
title: "[feat] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## What problem does this solve?

A clear description of the user need or pain point.

## Proposed solution

How you'd like WOTANN to handle it. Be concrete — sketch the CLI command, UI, or API surface if applicable.

```bash
wotann new-thing --flag value
```

## Alternatives considered

What else could solve this? Why is your proposal better?

## Prior art

Does another tool (Cursor, Claude Code, Aider, Continue, ...) already do this? Link the docs or source if you can — it makes the port faster.

## Scope

- [ ] CLI / TUI
- [ ] Desktop app
- [ ] iOS app
- [ ] Daemon RPC
- [ ] Provider adapter
- [ ] Channel adapter
- [ ] Memory layer
- [ ] Other: ...

## Free-tier compatibility

WOTANN's first-class commitment is "every feature works on free models too." How would your proposal degrade gracefully on Ollama / Gemini free tier?

## Additional context

Anything else — mockups, related discussions, willingness to PR it yourself.
